title: ukia's spears & lances
description: spears with visual weight progression from light spears to heavy lances. (WITH NAMED VARIANTS)
body:
adds visual weight progression from light spears to heavy lances.
(WITH RENAMES)
all materials able to be renamed into the shapes of the others.
tournament lances based on houses from Fire Emblem: Three Houses.

Also check out my [Full Tools Retexture](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ukias-tools) !

**No mods required.**
However, [RP Renames](https://modrinth.com/mod/rp-renames) recommended for ease of use! :)

![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bf52ee75e8432cd28962ea54a6813eff62f9a97.png)
![sprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/72e08229fb91489444cb1e4fb4f1611f9f5c4e2a.png)
![renames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94f0fec0dd2a52ffe1b38316c9b61253cc5bc7d6.png)

Renames List: (Current)
- "Adler Lance" = Red Tournament Lance. (for Iron, Diamond, and Netherite)
- "Hirsch Lance" = Yellow Tournament Lance. (for Iron, Diamond, and Netherite)
- "Lowen Lance" = Blue Tournament Lance. (for Iron, Diamond, and Netherite)
- "Flint Spear" = Flint Headed Spear. (for Stone Spear)
- "Pitchfork" = Pitchfork. (for Wooden Spear)
- "(Material) Lance" = Spear in Lance Shape. (for Iron, and Netherite)
- "(Material) Halberd" = Spear in Lance Shape. (for Iron, Diamond, and Netherite)
- "(Material) Boar Spear" = Shape of Iron Spear. (for Diamond and Netherite)
- "(Material) Greatlance" = Spear in Greatlance Shape. (for Iron and Diamond)
- "(Material) Guisarme" = French Guisarme Polearm Shape. (for Iron, Diamond, and Netherite)
- "(Material) Glaive" = Glaive Shape. (for Iron, Diamond, and Netherite)
- "(Material) Naginata" = Naginata Shape. (for Iron, Diamond, and Netherite)
